languages.text: Чудовище растерянно топчется на месте, щелкая жвалами и дергая головой.

traits.locale_text: Чудовище растерянно топчется на месте, щелкая жвалами и дергая головой.

languages.text: The monster confusedly stomps on the spot, working its jaws and tossing its head.
languages.original_text: Чудовище растерянно топчется на месте, щелкая жвалами и дергая головой.

traits.locale_text: The monster confusedly stomps on the spot, working its jaws and tossing its head.
The monster confusedly stomps on the spot, working its jaws and tossing its head.
The monster confusedly stomps on the spot, working its jaws and tossing its head.

languages.text: El monstruo, confuso, pisotea el suelo, mueve sus fauces y cabecea.
languages.original_text: The monster confusedly stomps on the spot, working its jaws and tossing its head.

traits.locale_text: El monstruo, confuso, pisotea el suelo, mueve sus fauces y cabecea.

languages.text: 那怪物困惑地在原地踏步，活动着下颚，不断甩动脑袋。
languages.original_text: The monster confusedly stomps on the spot, working its jaws and tossing its head.

traits.locale_text: 那怪物困惑地在原地踏步，活动着下颚，不断甩动脑袋。

languages.text: Le monstre piétine confusément sur place, claquant des mâchoires et secouant la tête.
languages.original_text: The monster confusedly stomps on the spot, working its jaws and tossing its head.

traits.locale_text: Le monstre piétine confusément sur place, claquant des mâchoires et secouant la tête.

languages.text: Canavar; şaşkınlıkla olduğu yerde tepiniyor, çenesini oynatıyor ve başını sallıyor.
languages.original_text: The monster confusedly stomps on the spot, working its jaws and tossing its head.

traits.locale_text: Canavar; şaşkınlıkla olduğu yerde tepiniyor, çenesini oynatıyor ve başını sallıyor.

languages.text: モンスターは、首を振ったり、顎を動かしたりしながら、その場で足踏みを繰り返す。
languages.original_text: The monster confusedly stomps on the spot, working its jaws and tossing its head.

traits.locale_text: モンスターは、首を振ったり、顎を動かしたりしながら、その場で足踏みを繰り返す。

languages.text: Das Monster stampft verwirrt auf der Stelle, kaut auf seinen Kiefern und schüttelt wild den Kopf.
languages.original_text: The monster confusedly stomps on the spot, working its jaws and tossing its head.

traits.locale_text: Das Monster stampft verwirrt auf der Stelle, kaut auf seinen Kiefern und schüttelt wild den Kopf.
